Side Project

Full Stack Developer

Projects at Side Project

View Details

Survey Management System

A full-featured web application that enables users to create, manage, and analyze surveys. Users can add different types of questions, generate unique shareable links or QR codes, and collect responses from participants. The system provides analytics with charts and maps to visualize results and track response patterns effectively.

Axtra Studios

Full Stack Developer

Apr 2026 - Present

Developed and deployed multiple full-stack applications for clients, focusing on performance and user experience.

Key Highlights

  • Built 'Urban DTF', a printing service platform with order tracking and Stripe integration.
  • Developed 'Nova Exordium', a project management tool with real-time dashboards.
  • Created 'Insight Carrier', a trucking insurance lead generation platform.
  • Implemented secure authentication and payment gateways in various e-commerce solutions.

Projects at Axtra Studios

View Details

Real Estate Media Pricing Calculator

Real Estate Media Pricing Calculator is a web-based pricing platform that helps real estate media professionals generate accurate, market-based pricing recommendations for photography, videography, drone services, floor plans, virtual staging, and twilight photography across the United States. The platform uses verified market data from 2,695 real estate media businesses to provide location-specific pricing ranges with confidence ratings, helping professionals price services competitively and confidently.

View Details

Extra Scrub

Extra Scrub Cleaning Services Website is a professional multi-page business website built for a cleaning company based in London. The platform helps customers explore residential and commercial cleaning services, request custom quotes, book appointments online, and contact the team easily. The goal was to create a modern, mobile-friendly digital presence that improves customer trust, simplifies service discovery, and increases booking conversions.

View Details

BRIEFS Coach

B.R.I.E.F.S. Coach is an AI-powered mental coaching platform that helps users record voice-based emotional “vents” and receive instant AI-generated coaching guidance with relevant YouTube video recommendations. The platform enables organizations and practitioners to provide scalable mental wellness support by combining voice recording, GPT-4 coaching responses, coach management, and subscription-based team access.

View Details

Treepost AI

Treepost AI is a Canadian marketplace platform that connects homeowners with certified tree service contractors through AI-powered price estimates, real-time bidding, secure payments, and direct communication. The platform simplifies the process of finding trusted contractors by replacing manual quote requests with instant AI estimates, verified professionals, and a transparent bidding system.

View Details

Insight Carrier

Insight Carrier is a B2B SaaS platform built for insurance agents, brokers, and carriers to access qualified trucking leads, company safety profiles, and policy renewal opportunities. The platform helps insurance professionals reduce manual research time, identify high-value prospects faster, and improve client retention using real-time motor carrier data.

React JSNext JSTailwind CSSNode JSMongoDB
View Details

Nova Exordium

Nova Exordium is an all-in-one platform designed to streamline project management and accelerate customer onboarding. It offers real-time dashboards, customizable templates, smart notifications, and collaborative tools to enhance team productivity and client engagement.

View Details

DTF Printing Customer Portal

Urban DTF Customer Portal is a full-stack web application built for URBAN DTF & T-SHIRTS, a custom DTF printing business. The platform allows customers to upload designs, configure garment orders, make secure payments, and track production progress in real time. It helps streamline order management, reduce manual communication, and improve customer experience by transforming traditional printing operations into a fully digital workflow.

Devmate Solution

Full Stack Developer (Remote)

Aug 2025 - Jan 2026

Developed responsive, mobile-friendly interfaces while deepening expertise in API integration, state management, and secure data handling. Gained practical experience with a CRM system covering sales, inventory, and financial reporting, and expanded full-stack deployment knowledge across Azure, GCP, and Railway.

Key Highlights

  • Developed expertise in creating responsive, mobile-friendly UIs for enhanced user experience.
  • Improved skills in API integration, state management, and secure data handling in web applications.
  • Worked on a CRM system handling wholesale sales, inventory management, and financial reporting.
  • Strengthened understanding of full-stack deployment across multiple cloud platforms (Azure, GCP, Railway).
